title: Stackable Potions x16
description: Stack your potions up to x16!!
body:
This mod allows all potions to stack up to 16 instead of just 1 — including splash and lingering variants!

No more cluttered inventory full of single bottles — carry your potions efficiently.


![NewMaxStackSize](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4407c3171bbf338bc1fa78e891100224342f86b8_0.webp)


by MikahHD
